Either plan beats delivery apps.

3rd party apps take 25–30% of every order. EatFuti is one flat fee, we cover your credit card fees, and our Automatic Intelligence brings you more orders too — you save and you sell more.

Example: a restaurant doing $10,000/month in online orders.

Common questions

Do you take a commission on my orders?

On Standard you pay 5% per order. On Pro it's 0% — you keep 100%. Either way it's a flat platform, and we cover your credit card processing fees.

Is there a setup fee?

It covers building your website and app, Google setup, importing your menu, and getting your photos and social media ready.

What does "Automatic Intelligence" mean?

It's the smart technology behind EatFuti — the ".AI" in EatFuti Inc. stands for Automatic Intelligence. It does the heavy lifting, and our restaurant experts always check the work before it reaches your customers.

I run an ethnic restaurant — can you handle my dishes and language?

Yes — that's exactly who we're built for. We keep your dish names authentic, post in your style, and support you in your own language.

I have more than one location?

Each location runs on its own plan, or ask us about a Custom plan built around all your locations.
